baseline_definitions.no_filters: AEEMU meta-network ensemble WITHOUT any signal processing filters. This is the primary baseline for ablation comparisons.
baseline_definitions.simple_ensemble: Weighted average of base model predictions using inverse-RMSE weights computed on validation set. No meta-network, no filters.
baseline_definitions.individual_models: Each base model (NCF, SASRec, LightGCN, MF) evaluated independently.
